name: Quick and Easy Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients in a large mixing bowl until well combined.
2. Shape the mixture into balls and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
3. Flatten each ball with a fork.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
5. Remove from oven and let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
